def get_signature(n_label, p):
    signature = []
    n = len(n_label)
    for i in range(n - p + 1):
        block = n_label[i:i+p]
        # Extract the values as integers
        values = [int(c) for c in block]
        sorted_values = sorted(values)
        # Create a dictionary to map value to its rank (1-based)
        rank_dict = {v: i+1 for i, v in enumerate(sorted_values)}
        # For each element in the original block, get its rank
        perm_label = ''.join(str(rank_dict[v]) for v in values)
        signature.append(perm_label)
    return tuple(signature)
